title: General rule of competency
doc_html:
CHAPTER 6

WITNESSES

Art. 601.  General rule of competency

Every person of proper understanding is competent to be a witness except as otherwise provided by legislation.

Acts 1988, No. 515, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1989.

CHAPTER 6
WITNESSES
Art. 601.  General rule of competency
Every person of proper understanding is competent to be a witness except as otherwise provided by legislation.
Acts 1988, No. 515, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1989.
